description: Explore and evaluate bleeding-edge model architectures for NZ legal NLP: MoR, TTT-Linear/RNN, Mamba-3/SSD, DiffusionGemma, SambaY, nex-agi models, MiMo-V2.5, DeVestral, TiRex. Phase 7 adds 2026 architectures: ModernBERT, Jamba 1.6, Llama 4/Gemma 3 MoE, RAG 2.0, DeepSeek-V3/R1, SSM encoders, test-time compute scaling.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 21 dry-run architecture comparison evidence is implemented. Phase 7 (2026 architectures) added 2026-06-26 with ModernBERT, Jamba 1.6, Llama 4/Gemma 3 MoE, RAG 2.0, DeepSeek-V3/R1, SSM encoders, and test-time compute scaling eval tasks. All external model downloads, CUDA/GPU execution, measured Pareto evidence, and Hugging Face publication remain pending.
